description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a wide, square base and a tall, conical body. The cone features two broad white reflective stripes encircling its upper section, providing high visibility in urban environments. The surface appears smooth with a slightly matte finish, and the material is likely a flexible, durable plastic or rubber, typical for traffic management equipment. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, seamlessly integrated with the rest of the cone. The base is flat, thick, and extends outward to provide stability, preventing the cone from tipping over easily. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the exterior, and the object appears to be in new, undamaged condition.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes, a wide square base, and a smooth, slightly matte surface. The cone is clean, undamaged, and designed for high visibility and stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, square base.
description_view_1: Side view with the same features visible; the stripes and base are clearly seen, with no additional markings.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the stripes and base; no distinguishing features on this side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the orange cone, white stripes, and square base with no visible markings.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper section of the cone, evenly spaced and of equal width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is a wide, flat square made of thick plastic, designed for stability and to prevent tipping; it appears solid and smooth with no visible patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The object appears new, clean, and undamaged, with no visible wear, fading, cracks, or dirt.
